content.scenarioHint: 你收到一个太大无法下载的视频文件，想请对方改用云盘链接发送，并确保权限设置正确。
content.speakerText: The video file is too large to download—could you share it via WeTransfer instead? Please set the link to expire in one week.
content.speakerTextCn: 视频文件太大下载不了，能改用WeTransfer发送吗？请将链接设置为一周后过期。
expectedAnswers: Sure! I'll upload it to WeTransfer and send you the link with a one-week expiry.
I can do that—just give me a minute to set it up and I'll email you the link.
Actually, I'd prefer Dropbox—would that work? I can set it to expire in 7 days.
No problem—I'll use WeTransfer and make sure it's accessible to anyone with the link.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提出了替代发送方式（如WeTransfer、Dropbox等）
语言准确性：是否正确使用了技术术语（如expire, link, upload）和语法结构
表达自然度：是否符合职场英语口语习惯，语气礼貌且清晰
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'too large', 'share via', 'link', 'expire' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: The video file is 2GB—I can't upload it to the team drive. Could I send it via WeTransfer?
content.speakerTextCn: 视频文件有2GB，无法上传到团队网盘，能用WeTransfer发吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, WeTransfer is fine—just make sure the link doesn't expire too soon.
Go ahead! Please set the link to expire in 7 days and notify me when you send it.
I'd prefer a lower-resolution version via email, but if you must use WeTransfer, please share the password too.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰接受或建议替代方案
是否包含具体操作建议（如过期时间、密码）
是否使用了专业、礼貌的语气，避免命令式表达
